results.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.07.
results.why: This pass is a general refinement for [[Wan Shi Tong]], tightening utility and mono-color support after validation removed problematic entries. [[Caged Sun]] and [[Everflowing Chalice]] improve scalable mana, while [[Emergence Zone]] and [[War Room]] add flexible utility without stressing the budget. The cuts trim narrower or less reliable pieces to keep the list smoother at a casual power level.

raw.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.07.
raw.plan: This pass is a general refinement for [[Wan Shi Tong]], tightening utility and mono-color support after validation removed problematic entries. [[Caged Sun]] and [[Everflowing Chalice]] improve scalable mana, while [[Emergence Zone]] and [[War Room]] add flexible utility without stressing the budget. The cuts trim narrower or less reliable pieces to keep the list smoother at a casual power level.
raw.why: This pass is a general refinement for [[Wan Shi Tong]], tightening utility and mono-color support after validation removed problematic entries. [[Caged Sun]] and [[Everflowing Chalice]] improve scalable mana, while [[Emergence Zone]] and [[War Room]] add flexible utility without stressing the budget. The cuts trim narrower or less reliable pieces to keep the list smoother at a casual power level.

added.caged sun: [[Caged Sun]] boosts a mono-color deck by doubling mana and increasing creature pressure.
added.emergence zone: [[Emergence Zone]] gives the deck a low-cost way to play key spells at instant speed.
added.everflowing chalice: [[Everflowing Chalice]] is flexible ramp that scales well through the game.
added.war room: [[War Room]] turns excess mana into steady card draw from a land slot.

removed.wan shi tong, librarian: [[Wan Shi Tong, Librarian]] was removed because the commander slot is already [[Wan Shi Tong]].
removed.waterbending scroll: [[Waterbending Scroll]] was cut as a lower-impact support piece in this refinement pass.
removed.windfall: [[Windfall]] was removed for being a less consistent fit for the deck’s smoother general plan.
removed.wizard class: [[Wizard Class]] was cut to make room for stronger standalone utility cards.

results.summary: Transformed: More casual. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.07.
results.why: This pass makes the deck more casual by trimming niche spell-package cards and replacing them with simple utility lands. The added lands improve card access, recovery, and flexibility without raising combo density or rules complexity. It also shifts some value into the mana base so the deck plays more smoothly at a relaxed table.

raw.summary: Transformed: More casual. Power Casual, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~3.07.
raw.plan: This pass makes the deck more casual by trimming niche spell-package cards and replacing them with simple utility lands. The added lands improve card access, recovery, and flexibility without raising combo density or rules complexity. It also shifts some value into the mana base so the deck plays more smoothly at a relaxed table.
raw.why: This pass makes the deck more casual by trimming niche spell-package cards and replacing them with simple utility lands. The added lands improve card access, recovery, and flexibility without raising combo density or rules complexity. It also shifts some value into the mana base so the deck plays more smoothly at a relaxed table.

added.bonders' enclave: [[Bonders' Enclave]] adds straightforward repeatable card draw from a land slot.
added.buried ruin: [[Buried Ruin]] gives the deck an easy way to recover an important artifact.
added.command beacon: [[Command Beacon]] helps recast the commander more casually through commander tax.
added.emergence zone: [[Emergence Zone]] offers a simple burst of flexibility without dedicating spell slots.
added.temple of the false god: [[Temple of the False God]] adds extra mana production for bigger casual turns.
added.terrain generator: [[Terrain Generator]] provides slow, fair ramp from the mana base.
added.war room: [[War Room]] turns excess mana into cards in a clean, low-maintenance way.

removed.triskaidekaphile: [[Triskaidekaphile]] is a narrower alternate-payoff card that is less needed in a casual smoothing pass.
removed.twenty-toed toad: [[Twenty-Toed Toad]] is a more specialized win-condition piece than this pass wants.
removed.valley floodcaller: [[Valley Floodcaller]] supports a tighter spell-focused package that this version tones down.
removed.wan shi tong, librarian: [[Wan Shi Tong, Librarian]] was removed as part of the validation cleanup and simplification.
removed.waterbending scroll: [[Waterbending Scroll]] is a narrower synergy card than the utility lands replacing it.
removed.windfall: [[Windfall]] creates swingier play patterns that this more casual build reduces.
removed.wizard class: [[Wizard Class]] is a slower payoff piece that was cut for broader utility.

cautions: General cleanup changed more than 24 cards; that feels aggressive for a cleanup pass.
warnings: General cleanup restored land count stability for this constructed deck.
Budget guard kept estimated deck price around Moderate expectations.
results.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.35.
results.why: This pass tightens the deck into a focused Abzan creature-combo shell built around efficient creature hits and token life-gain synergies. [[Collected Company]] and [[Chord of Calling]] improve consistency, while [[Gilded Goose]], [[Prosperous Innkeeper]], [[Rosie Cotton of South Lane]], [[Scurry Oak]], and [[Woe Strider]] give the deck a clearer proactive plan. The land swaps also stabilize the mana base for the new color requirements while keeping the list within a moderate budget.

raw.summary: Transformed: General refinement. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.35.
raw.plan: This pass tightens the deck into a focused Abzan creature-combo shell built around efficient creature hits and token life-gain synergies. [[Collected Company]] and [[Chord of Calling]] improve consistency, while [[Gilded Goose]], [[Prosperous Innkeeper]], [[Rosie Cotton of South Lane]], [[Scurry Oak]], and [[Woe Strider]] give the deck a clearer proactive plan. The land swaps also stabilize the mana base for the new color requirements while keeping the list within a moderate budget.
raw.why: This pass tightens the deck into a focused Abzan creature-combo shell built around efficient creature hits and token life-gain synergies. [[Collected Company]] and [[Chord of Calling]] improve consistency, while [[Gilded Goose]], [[Prosperous Innkeeper]], [[Rosie Cotton of South Lane]], [[Scurry Oak]], and [[Woe Strider]] give the deck a clearer proactive plan. The land swaps also stabilize the mana base for the new color requirements while keeping the list within a moderate budget.

results.summary: Transformed: Curve tightening. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~1.7.
results.why: This pass tightens the curve by replacing slower, off-plan cards and awkward mana with cheap creatures, food synergies, and cleaner black-green sources. [[Cauldron Familiar]], [[Gilded Goose]], [[Nest Invader]], and [[Ravenous Squirrel]] give the deck more early plays that develop pressure and material efficiently. The land swaps also reduce color strain so the deck can deploy its low-cost spells more consistently.

results.summary: Transformed: More interaction. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.1.
results.why: This pass increases low-cost interaction so the deck can answer threats and protect its plan earlier and more reliably. [[Go for the Throat]], [[Spell Pierce]], and [[Negate]] add clean removal and stack interaction without raising the curve much. The cuts come from lower-impact noninteractive slots, including a spell and several lands, to make room for those answers.

results.summary: Transformed: More casual. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~1.95.
results.why: This pass makes the deck more casual by trimming scattered multicolor and novelty pieces for a cleaner black-green core. [[Mosswood Dreadknight]], [[Sentinel of the Nameless City]], and [[Questing Beast]] give the deck straightforward creature pressure, while the land changes make casting spells much more consistent. The result is a more focused, easier-to-pilot list that still keeps solid interaction and value.

results.summary: Transformed: More optimized. Power Focused, budget Moderate. Avg CMC ~2.18.
results.why: This pass tightens the deck into a cleaner black-green midrange shell with stronger early plays, more efficient removal, and a much better mana base. Cards like [[Glissa Sunslayer]], [[Mosswood Dreadknight]], and [[Sentinel of the Nameless City]] raise the creature quality, while [[Go for the Throat]] improves interaction at a low cost. The land swaps cut off-color and low-impact sources for more reliable casting, with [[Llanowar Wastes]], [[Overgrown Tomb]], and [[Boseiju, Who Endures]] improving both speed and utility.
